calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-09-2003 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Sep-26-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack, CSR: Margaret Del Coto
Appearances:
Douglas Holloway, Esq. for Plaintiff Trinity Capital Corporation.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendant Center for Living and Working, Inc.
Principal of $70,247.31
Attorney's fees of $2,500.00
Costs of $274.50
Interest of $1,771.00 For the total of $74,792.81.

Judgment signed in open court.
